## Prerequisites

List what the user needs before starting:

- Prerequisite 1 (e.g., Ruby 3.2+ installed)
- Prerequisite 2 (e.g., PostgreSQL running)
- Prerequisite 3 (e.g., Admin access)

Verify prerequisites (if applicable):

```bash
# Check Ruby version
ruby --version  # Should show 3.2.0 or higher

# Check PostgreSQL
psql --version  # Should show 12.0 or higher
```
